bob.source: dashboard/data/bob-q2-2026.csv (Chachi BoB 2026 sheet, Q2 2026 Accounts tab)
rules_applied: Excellent Fit or Potential Fit only
bob.pending_rule: Exclude accounts with 0 contacts — needs Vault CRM contact counts per account (not in BoB sheet)

chachi_activity.definition: Touch = dial (SF Task type=Call or Vault dial) OR cadence/sequence enrolment (Vault) OR event invite (SF Task subject contains event name or CampaignMember) OR one-off email (SF Task type=Email or Vault activity log). De-duped by account ID. See feedback_activity_definition memory.

touched_rules: All High priority → assumed touched via call
Sales Notes or Comments present in BoB → touched (counts as activity note)
Account name matches Vault CRM cadence enrollment → touched
